creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://people.freebsd.org/~makc/patches/kde-4.12.1-20140205.diff.xz

Major changes:
1) KDE4_PREFIX has been changed from /usr/local/kde4 to ${LOCALBASE}
2) Libraries versions are now follow upstream scheme
3) kde4-workspace requires WITH_NEW_XORG (25 port depend on it)
4) All KDE SC ports now have stage support
